notes: Use Qwen3-VL-8B for local smoke and ablation iteration.
Use Qwen3-VL-32B as the paper-grade primary local model on the 96GB GPU.
Use InternVL3.5, GLM-4.6V, and Kimi-VL as comparative baselines when their HF loaders are compatible with the local Transformers version.
Keep all outputs candidate-only and evaluate against geometry consistency metrics.
Use the structural-core CadStruct LoRA configs for Stage-1 model-target aligned training.
